description_blurb:
Gemini 7 was the tenth crewed American spaceflight. This document is a transcript of communications between the flight crew, Astronauts James “Jim” Lovell and Frank Borman, and the Manned Flight Center (now known as Johnson Space Center) in Houston, Texas. The transcript begins with Borman’s report of a “bogey,” contemporary nomenclature for an unknown aircraft, as well as a debris field. Borman described the debris field as consisting of “very, very many […] hundreds of little particles.” He estimated the particles’ distance from the spacecraft to be four miles. Lovell described observing a “brilliant body in the sun against a black background with trillions of particles on it.”
This document also includes handwritten notes documenting the encounter, annotated with the phrase “UFO Sighting by Borman” in the top right corner.
title: NASA-UAP-D3, Gemini 7 Transcript, 1965
summary: A transcript of communications from the Gemini 7 spaceflight in 1965, documenting Astronauts Frank Borman and James Lovell's observations. Borman reported a "bogey" at "ten o'clock high" and "hundreds of little particles" estimated at three to four miles away, which appeared to be going into polar orbit. Lovell described observing a "brilliant body in the sun against a black background with trillions of particles on it," observed ahead at his two o'clock position and slowly tumbling. The document includes handwritten notes titled "UFO SIGHTING BY BORMAN".
reported_object_description: An unidentified "bogey", "hundreds of little particles", and a "brilliant body" with "trillions of particles".
reported_behavior: The particles were "going by to the left" and "going into polar orbit". The "brilliant body" was "slowly tumbling".
bust_reasoning: The bust score is high because the astronauts themselves provide mundane explanations for the observations. Borman quickly clarifies the 'bogey' as 'debris' and 'hundreds of little particles'. Lovell then identifies the 'brilliant body' as 'the booster' and notes it is surrounded by 'trillions of particles'. These direct statements from the witnesses strongly point to known space objects and phenomena.
full_text:
# NASA-UAP-D3, Gemini 7 Transcript, 1965 - Page 1

TAPE No. T-00763(R1b)

"P.A.O. RELEASE COMMENTARY OF THE GT-7/6 FLIGHT."

P.A.O. SINCE THEN WE HAVE DUBBED THE TAPE OFF. THE MASTER TAPE HERE IN THE CONTROL CENTER AND WE ARE NOW PREPARED TO PLAY IT FOR YOU - IT CONTAINS REFERENCES TO SIGHTING NOT ONLY SOME PARTICLES BUT AS WELL AS AN UNIDENTIFIED OBJECT PLUS THE BOOSTER HERS THAT TAPE WE'LL PLAY IT FOR YOU NOW----

| Speaker | Text |
| :--- | :--- |
| S/C | GEMINI-7 HERE HOUSTON-- HOW DO YOU READ? |
| HOUSTON: | LOUD AND CLEAR SEVEN - GO AHEAD. |
| S/C | (BORMAN) A BOGEY AT TEN O'CLOCK HIGH. |
| HOUSTON | THIS IS HOUSTON, SAY AGAIN SEVEN? |
| S/C | (BORMAN) I SAID WE HAVE A BOGEY AT TEN O'CLOCK HIGH. |
| HOUSTON | ROGER. GEMINI-7 ISTHAT THE BOOSTER OR IS THAT A NATURAL SIGHTING? |
| S/C | A WHAT? |
| HOUSTON | SAY AGAIN SEVEN. |
| S/C | (BORMAN) WE HAVE DEBRIS UP HERE - THIS IS AN ACTUAL SIGHTING. |
| HOUSTON | YOU HAVE ANY MORE INFORMATION - ESTIMATE DISTANCE OR SIZE? |
| S/C | (BORMAN) WE ALSO HAVE THE BOOSTER IN SIGHT. |
| HOUSTON | UNDERSTAND YOU ALSO HAVE THE BOOSTER IN SIGHT. ROGER. |
| S/C | (BORMAN) WE HAVE VERY, VERY MANY A - IT LOOKS LIKE HUNDREDS OF LITTLE PARTICLES GOING BY TO THE LEFT OUT ABOUT THREE OR FOUR MILES. |
| HOUSTON | UNDERSTAND YOU HAVE MANY SMALL PARTICLES GOING BY ON THE LEFT AT WHAT DISTANCE? |
| S/C | (BORMAN) ....GARBLED ... FOUR MILES. OH, ABOUT - GARBLED - IT LOOKS LIKE A PATH OF THE VEHICLE AT 90 DEGREES. |
| HOUSTON | ROGER. UNDERSTAND THEY'RE ABOUT THREE OR FOUR MILES AWAY |
| S/C | (BORMAN) THEY'VE PASSED NOW. THEY'RE GOING INTO POLAR ORBIT. |
| HOUSTON | ROG ER. UNDERSTAND THEY WERE THREE TO FOUR MILES AWAY. |
| S/C | THATS WHAT IT APPEARED LIKE. THATS ROGER. |
| HOUSTON | GEMINI-7 - HOUSTON - WERE THESE PARTICLES IN ADDITION TO THE BOOSTER AND THE BOGEY AT TEN O'CLOCK HIGH? |
| S/C | (LOVELL) ROGER. I HAVE THE BOOSTER ON MY SIDE. ITS A BRILLIANT BODY IN THE SUN AGAINST A BLACK BACKGROUND WITH TRILLIONS OF PARTICLES ON IT. |
| HOUSTON | ROGER WHAT DIRECTION IS IT FROM YOU? |
| S/C | (LOVELL) ITS ABOUT AT MY TWO O'CLOCK POSITION. |
| HOUSTON | DOES THAT MEAN ITS AHEAD OF YOU? |
| S/C | (LOVELL) ITS AHEAD OF US AT TWO O'CLOCK, SLOWLY TUMBLING |
| HOUSTON | ROGER. |

.......... LONG PAUSE........ DUAL TRANSMISSION.......

P.A.O. THIS IS GEMINI CONTROL AGAIN THE REFERENCE IN THAT CONVERSATION TO THE THIRD AND UNIDENTIFIED OBJECT OF COURSE WAS OR THE THIRD OBJECT WAS A BOGEY. THERE WERE SEVERAL REFERENCES TO THE BOGEY. AT 4 Hrs 24 MIN INTO THE FLIGHT THIS IS GEMINI CONTROL.

- 1 -



# NASA-UAP-D3, Gemini 7 Transcript, 1965 - Page 2

T-00763 (R18)

"UFO SIGHTING BY BORMAN" (GT-7)

Since then we have dubbed the tape off
the master tape here in the Control Center and we
are now prepared to play it for you. It contains
references to sighting not only some particles but
as well as an unidentified object a plus the booster
here that tape we'll play it for you now -

S/C :- Gemini 7 here Houston - how do you read?
Houston :- loud & clear 7 go ahead.
S/C .. a bogey at 10 oclock high (Borman)
Houston :- this is Houston say again seven?
S/C :- [Borman] I said we have a bogey at 10 oclock high.
Houston :- Roger. Gemini 7 is that the booster is that
a natural sighting?
S/C :- a what?
Houston :- Say again seven.
S/C :- [Borman] We have debris up here - this is an actual sighting
Houston :- you have anymore information - Estimate
distance or size?
S/C :- [Borman] We also have the boosters in sight.
Houston :- Understand you also have the boosters in sight. roger,
S/C :- [Borman] We have very very many - it looks like hundreds of
going little a particles going by to the left out about
3 to 4 miles
Houston :- understand you have many small particles going



# NASA-UAP-D3, Gemini 7 Transcript, 1965 - Page 3

Houston:
fly on the left at what distance?

S/C: - [crossed out: Borman] - garbled - 4 miles. it looks like a [crossed out: round] vehicle [crossed out: partly painted] oh about garbled
it looks like a part of the [illegible] at 90 degrees
Houston: - Roger. understand they're about 3 to 4 miles away
S/C: - [inserted: Borman] they passed now - they're going into polor orbit
Houston: - Roger understand they were 3-4 miles away.
S/C: - thats what it appeared like. thats roger.
Houston: - Gemini-7 - Houston - were these particles in
addition to the booster and the bogey at 10 oclock [inserted: high]
[crossed out text]

S/C: - (Lovell): - Roger. I have the booster myself
its a brilliant body in the sun against a black
background with millions of particles on it.
Houston: - roger what direction is it from you
S/C: - (Lovell) its about at my 2 oclock position.
Houston: - does that mean that its ahead of you?
S/C: - (Lovell) its ahead of us at 2 oclock slowly [crossed out text]
Houston - roger.
[long pause - two garbled transmissions] tumbling
Houston - roger
[inserted: PAO]
[crossed out text] Gemini Control: Gemini Control here again the reference
in that conversation to the third and unidentified
object of course - was [inserted: or] the third object was
a bogey
cover_up_reasoning: There is no evidence of concealment in this document. The transcript includes minor editorial marks (crossed-out text, insertions) typical of a transcription process, not redactions for secrecy. Furthermore, the Public Affairs Officer (PAO) commentary openly discusses the 'unidentified object' or 'bogey', indicating transparency rather than suppression.
title_zh: 美国国家航空航天局-未识别空中现象-D3，双子座7号飞行记录，1965年
summary_zh: 本文件系1965年双子座7号太空飞行期间的通信记录，其中记载了宇航员弗兰克·博尔曼和詹姆斯·洛弗尔的观测情况。博尔曼报告在“十点钟高位”发现一个“不明目标”（bogey），并观测到“数百个小颗粒”，估计距离三到四英里，这些颗粒似乎正在进入极地轨道。洛弗尔描述观测到一个“在阳光下、黑色背景中闪耀的物体，上面有数万亿个颗粒”，该物体在其两点钟方向前方被观测到，并缓慢翻滚。该文件包含题为“博尔曼观测到UFO”的手写笔记。
reported_object_description_zh: 一个未识别的“不明目标”（bogey）、“数百个小颗粒”，以及一个附有“数万亿个颗粒”的“闪耀物体”。
reported_behavior_zh: 这些颗粒“向左方经过”并“进入极地轨道”。该“闪耀物体”则“缓慢翻滚”。
bust_reasoning_zh: 此次事件的破解可能性较高，原因在于宇航员本人对观测结果提供了世俗解释。博尔曼迅速澄清“不明目标”为“碎片”和“数百个小颗粒”。洛弗尔随后将“闪耀物体”识别为“助推器”，并指出其周围环绕着“数万亿个颗粒”。这些来自目击者的直接陈述有力地指向了已知的空间物体和现象。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 本文件中没有发现任何隐瞒证据。记录中包含一些轻微的编辑标记（划掉的文本、插入内容），这些是转录过程的典型特征，而非出于保密目的的删节。此外，公共事务官（PAO）的评论公开讨论了“未识别物体”或“不明目标”（bogey），这表明了透明度而非压制。
claims: Astronaut Borman observed "hundreds of little particles" at 3-4 miles distance
Astronaut Lovell observed a "brilliant body" with "trillions of particles on it"
claims_zh: 宇航员博尔曼观测到一个“不明目标”（bogey）
宇航员博尔曼观测到距离3-4英里处有“数百个小颗粒”
宇航员洛弗尔观测到一个附有“数万亿个颗粒”的“闪耀物体”
bust_explanations: Spacecraft debris or ice particles: Astronaut Borman explicitly refers to the sighting as 'debris' and 'hundreds of little particles'. Astronaut Lovell describes 'the booster' as having 'trillions of particles on it', indicating that particles are a known phenomenon in this context.

The booster itself: Astronaut Lovell identifies a 'brilliant body' that is 'slowly tumbling' as 'the booster'. The initial 'bogey' or some of the particles could have been associated with the booster before its full identification.
bust_explanations_zh: 航天器碎片或冰晶颗粒：宇航员博尔曼明确将观测到的物体称为“碎片”和“数百个小颗粒”。宇航员洛弗尔描述“助推器”上附有“数万亿个颗粒”，表明颗粒在此情境下是一种已知现象。
助推器本身：宇航员洛弗尔将一个“缓慢翻滚”的“闪耀物体”识别为“助推器”。最初的“不明目标”（bogey）或部分颗粒可能在完全识别之前与该助推器相关联。
